skills.name: Acrobatics
skills.use: Balance, tumbling, staying on your feet, escaping a grapple by slipping free.

skills.name: Sleight of Hand
skills.use: Pickpocketing, palming objects, planting items, manual trickery.

skills.name: Stealth
skills.use: Hiding, moving silently, slipping past notice.

skills.name: Arcana
skills.use: Spells, magic items, eldritch symbols, planes, magical lore.

skills.name: History
skills.use: Past events, legends, kingdoms, wars, lost civilizations.

skills.name: Investigation
skills.use: Deduce from clues, find hidden things, work out how something functions.

skills.name: Nature
skills.use: Terrain, plants, animals, weather, natural cycles.

skills.name: Religion
skills.use: Deities, rites, holy symbols, religious hierarchies and practices.

skills.name: Animal Handling
skills.use: Calm or read an animal, control a mount in a tough spot.

skills.name: Insight
skills.use: Read intentions, detect lies, sense a creature's true feelings.

skills.name: Medicine
skills.use: Stabilize the dying, diagnose illness, treat wounds without magic.

skills.name: Perception
skills.use: Spot, hear, or otherwise notice something. The most-used skill.

skills.name: Survival
skills.use: Track, forage, navigate wilderness, predict weather, follow trails.

skills.name: Deception
skills.use: Lie convincingly, disguise intent, mislead through words or action.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.use: Threats, hostile pressure, coercion through fear.

skills.name: Performance
skills.use: Music, dance, acting, oratory — entertaining an audience.

skills.name: Persuasion
skills.use: Influence with tact, social grace, good-faith argument.

turn_undead.name: Turn Undead (Channel Divinity)
turn_undead.summary: As an action, present your holy symbol. Each undead within 30 ft that can see or hear you must make a Wisdom save (DC = your spell save DC). On a fail, it is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage.
turn_undead.turned_effect: A turned creature must spend its turns trying to move as far from you as it can, can't willingly end its move within 30 ft of you, can't take reactions, and may only Dash or attempt to escape an effect that prevents movement. With nowhere to flee, it may use the Dodge action.
turn_undead.destroy_note: Destroy Undead (a feature gained at level 5): when an undead of the listed CR or lower fails its save against your Turn Undead, it is instantly destroyed instead of merely turned.
turn_undead.uses: A cleric has one Channel Divinity use at levels 2–5, two at 6–17, three at 18+. Recharge on a short or long rest.
turn_undead.campaign_note: Site Skeletons are CR 1/4 and Thornwall Shades are ~CR 1/2 — both turnable, and destroyable outright once a cleric hits level 5. Worth flagging to Rick/Luke that this is a live tool against the Hollow.
